negative_base: low quality, blurry, watermark, visible logo, malformed anatomy, duplicate objects, oversaturated colors, fantasy art, vector illustration, flat infographic, rendered UI, text artifacts

amber_lab_noir.prompt_modifier: Warm amber practical light, dark charcoal shadows, tactile parchment grain, quiet laboratory tension, premium editorial realism, restrained teal helper accents, no neon.

graphite_editorial.prompt_modifier: Graphite-heavy editorial look, ivory paper highlights, controlled contrast, museum-catalog seriousness, cleaner geometry, very restrained warm glow.
graphite_editorial.color_notes: Ivory, graphite, soot black, faint amber.

velvet_stage_math.prompt_modifier: Stage-like composition with velvet-dark background, focused spotlights, stronger theatrical contrast, richer shadows, elegant tension without spectacle.
velvet_stage_math.color_notes: Black velvet, amber spotlight, burgundy undertone, graphite marks.

switching_rule.behavior: Apply the matching prompt_modifier before image generation. Render-time tint can still be layered in Remotion but the image should already carry the chosen style.
switching_rule.fallback: Use amber_lab_noir unless a specific scene needs a more minimal graphite_editorial or more theatrical velvet_stage_math treatment.
